testcase.name: test_parametrized_ambiguity[12/12/2025-True]

failure.message: AssertionError: assert (True is False or False is True) + where True = UncertaintyState(can_post=True, partial_post_allowed=False, must_block=False, unresolved_reasons=[], confidence_by_field={'date': 0.95, 'vendor': 0.95, 'amount': 0.99}, posting_recommendation='SAFE_TO_POST').can_post + and False = UncertaintyState(can_post=True, partial_post_allowed=False, must_block=False, unresolved_reasons=[], confidence_by_field={'date': 0.95, 'vendor': 0.95, 'amount': 0.99}, posting_recommendation='SAFE_TO_POST').must_block

testcase.failure: tests\red_team\adversarial_az\test_d_date_ambiguity_destruction.py:79: in test_parametrized_ambiguity assert state.can_post is False or state.must_block is True E AssertionError: assert (True is False or False is True) E + where True = UncertaintyState(can_post=True, partial_post_allowed=False, must_block=False, unresolved_reasons=[], confidence_by_field={'date': 0.95, 'vendor': 0.95, 'amount': 0.99}, posting_recommendation='SAFE_TO_POST').can_post E + and False = UncertaintyState(can_post=True, partial_post_allowed=False, must_block=False, unresolved_reasons=[], confidence_by_field={'date': 0.95, 'vendor': 0.95, 'amount': 0.99}, posting_recommendation='SAFE_TO_POST').must_block

skipped.message: P1 DEFECT: audit_log allows DELETE — no append-only constraint. Business consequence: CRA/RQ audit trail can be destroyed.
P1 DEFECT: audit_log timestamp can be backdated via UPDATE. Business consequence: Falsified audit evidence.
P1 DEFECT: audit_log event_type can be overwritten. A fraud detection event can be disguised as approval.

testcase.name: test_cca_deterministic

failure.message: AssertionError: Non-deterministic CCA: 10 variants assert 10 == 1 + where 10 = len({"[{'asset_id': 'FA-1F28CEEC7381', 'asset_name': 'Asset', 'cca_class': 10, 'cca_class_display': '10', 'opening_ucc': 42500.0, 'additions': 50000.0, 'disposals': 0.0, 'cca_amount': 12750.0, 'closing_ucc': 29750.0}]", "[{'asset_id': 'FA-30299DF28978', 'asset_name': 'Asset', 'cca_class': 10, 'cca_class_display': '10', 'opening_ucc': 42500.0, 'additions': 50000.0, 'disposals': 0.0, 'cca_amount': 12750.0, 'closing_ucc': 29750.0}]", "[{'asset_id': 'FA-60F2F477245E', 'asset_name': 'Asset', 'cca_class': 10, 'cca_class_display': '10', 'opening_ucc': 42500.0, 'additions': 50000.0, 'disposals': 0.0, 'cca_amount': 12750.0, 'closing_ucc': 29750.0}]", "[{'asset_id': 'FA-6949CA31BA42', 'asset_name': 'Asset', 'cca_class': 10, 'cca_class_display': '10', 'opening_ucc': 42500.0, 'additions': 50000.0, 'disposals': 0.0, 'cca_amount': 12750.0, 'closing_ucc': 29750.0}]", "[{'asset_id': 'FA-8CC7456A5AA5', 'asset_name': 'Asset', 'cca_class': 10, 'cca_class_display': '10', 'opening_ucc': 42500.0, 'additions': 50000.0, 'disposals': 0.0, 'cca_amount': 12750.0, 'closing_ucc': 29750.0}]", "[{'asset_id': 'FA-AB5F39CAC5B3', 'asset_name': 'Asset', 'cca_class': 10, 'cca_class_display': '10', 'opening_ucc': 42500.0, 'additions': 50000.0, 'disposals': 0.0, 'cca_amount': 12750.0, 'closing_ucc': 29750.0}]", ...})

testcase.failure: tests\red_team\adversarial_az\test_y_year_end_boundary.py:254: in test_cca_deterministic assert len(results) == 1, f"Non-deterministic CCA: {len(results)} variants" E AssertionError: Non-deterministic CCA: 10 variants E assert 10 == 1 E + where 10 = len({"[{'asset_id': 'FA-1F28CEEC7381', 'asset_name': 'Asset', 'cca_class': 10, 'cca_class_display': '10', 'opening_ucc': 42500.0, 'additions': 50000.0, 'disposals': 0.0, 'cca_amount': 12750.0, 'closing_ucc': 29750.0}]", "[{'asset_id': 'FA-30299DF28978', 'asset_name': 'Asset', 'cca_class': 10, 'cca_class_display': '10', 'opening_ucc': 42500.0, 'additions': 50000.0, 'disposals': 0.0, 'cca_amount': 12750.0, 'closing_ucc': 29750.0}]", "[{'asset_id': 'FA-60F2F477245E', 'asset_name': 'Asset', 'cca_class': 10, 'cca_class_display': '10', 'opening_ucc': 42500.0, 'additions': 50000.0, 'disposals': 0.0, 'cca_amount': 12750.0, 'closing_ucc': 29750.0}]", "[{'asset_id': 'FA-6949CA31BA42', 'asset_name': 'Asset', 'cca_class': 10, 'cca_class_display': '10', 'opening_ucc': 42500.0, 'additions': 50000.0, 'disposals': 0.0, 'cca_amount': 12750.0, 'closing_ucc': 29750.0}]", "[{'asset_id': 'FA-8CC7456A5AA5', 'asset_name': 'Asset', 'cca_class': 10, 'cca_class_display': '10', 'opening_ucc': 42500.0, 'additions': 50000.0, 'disposals': 0.0, 'cca_amount': 12750.0, 'closing_ucc': 29750.0}]", "[{'asset_id': 'FA-AB5F39CAC5B3', 'asset_name': 'Asset', 'cca_class': 10, 'cca_class_display': '10', 'opening_ucc': 42500.0, 'additions': 50000.0, 'disposals': 0.0, 'cca_amount': 12750.0, 'closing_ucc': 29750.0}]", ...})
